# Indus Automation Inc.

> Full-service industrial automation company based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada.

## About

Indus Automation Inc. designs, builds, programs, and commissions industrial automation systems for a wide range of industries. All control panels are CSA certified and fabricated in-house. We are a Siemens Solution Provider and work with Allen-Bradley, Omron, Schneider, and other major platforms.

## Services

- Control Panel Design & Fabrication (CSA C22.2 certified, UL 508A compliant)
- PLC/HMI/SCADA Programming (Allen-Bradley, Siemens, Omron, Schneider)
- Design & Drafting (AutoCAD Electrical, EPLAN)
- Documentation (FDS, O&M manuals, SOPs, FAT/SAT procedures)
- Commissioning (I/O checkout, loop verification, operator training)
- Troubleshooting & Maintenance (24/7 emergency support available)
- Procurement (BOM management, vendor sourcing, logistics)
- Instrumentation Services (selection, installation, calibration, HART/Fieldbus)

## Industries Served

- Agriculture (grain handling, feed systems, seed processing)
- Food Processing (batching, mixing, packaging, sanitary controls)
- Mining (conveyor systems, crusher controls, ore processing)
- Metal Treatment (furnace controls, quench systems, plating lines)
- Water Treatment (pump stations, chemical dosing, SCADA)
- Utilities (power distribution, substation automation, load management)

## Contact

- Address: 1-442 Higgins Avenue, Winnipeg, MB R3A 1S5, Canada
- Phone: 204-943-0050
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM CST
- Emergency: 24-hour emergency service available
- Website: https://www.indusautomation.ca

## Certifications

- CSA Certified Panel Shop
- Siemens Solution Provider
